item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Prevailing Wage Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Prevailing Wage

Davis-Bacon prevailing wage reform 119th Congress: threshold modernization · cooperative-employer eligibility · enforcement provisions. Composes with #16 Brass Tacks + Worker-Cooperative Conversion. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
